def positive_python_perf_layer_string_handling_plus_equals_string_in_loop():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_string_handling_plus_equals_string_in_loop"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Layer: String handling. Flag repeated += string growth in loops where join or StringIO avoids quadratic copying."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
